input.text: Our product will 100% definitely cure your headaches in under 5 minutes, guaranteed.

rules.description: No absolute medical claims (cure, guaranteed, 100% effective).
No specific time-to-relief promises without clinical citation.

violations.explanation: Uses 'cure' and '100% definitely' — both prohibited absolute medical claims.
violations.suggested_rewording: May help relieve headache symptoms for some people

violations.explanation: Specific time-to-relief promise without supporting clinical citation.
violations.suggested_rewording: with onset of relief varying by individual

expected.summary: Two violations — remove absolute claims and specific time promises before publishing.

input.text: We share your name, email address, and browsing history with third-party advertising partners to personalize your experience.

rules.description: Personal data must not be shared with third parties without explicit user consent language.
Data subjects must be informed of their right to withdraw consent.

violations.excerpt: We share your name, email address, and browsing history with third-party advertising partners
violations.explanation: Personal data sharing is disclosed without any statement of user consent or opt-in mechanism.
violations.suggested_rewording: With your explicit consent, we may share your name and email with selected advertising partners. You can withdraw consent at any time.

violations.explanation: No mention of the data subject's right to withdraw consent or manage preferences.
violations.suggested_rewording: You have the right to withdraw consent and manage your data preferences at any time in your account settings.

expected.summary: Two GDPR violations — add consent language and a right-to-withdraw notice before publishing.

input.text: The Lumina Pro 4K camera features a 1-inch CMOS sensor, 10-stop ND filter, and 4-hour battery life. Compatible with standard tripod mounts.

rules.description: All product specifications must be verifiable and not misleading.
No comparative superlatives (best, fastest, cheapest) without substantiation.

expected.summary: Compliant — all claims are specific and verifiable, no unsubstantiated superlatives found.

input.text: We are looking for a young and energetic salesman to join our growing team. The ideal candidate is a recent grad with no more than 3 years of experience.

rules.description: Job postings must not use gendered language (salesman, waitress, etc.).
Job postings must not imply age preferences or requirements not tied to a legitimate occupational qualification.

violations.explanation: Gendered term 'salesman' excludes non-male candidates and may constitute unlawful discrimination.
'Young' implies an age preference with no legitimate occupational basis, which violates age discrimination statutes.

expected.summary: Two equal-opportunity violations — replace gendered and age-implying language before posting.

input.text: Invest today and earn guaranteed returns of 15% annually. Your capital is completely safe with our proprietary algorithm.

rules.description: Investment materials must not promise guaranteed returns.
All investment materials must include a risk warning stating that capital is at risk.

violations.explanation: Promising guaranteed investment returns is prohibited — past performance is not indicative of future results and no returns can be guaranteed.
violations.suggested_rewording: historical returns have averaged 15% annually; past performance does not guarantee future results

violations.explanation: Claiming capital is completely safe is a prohibited statement; a risk warning is required.
violations.suggested_rewording: Capital is at risk. The value of your investment can go down as well as up.

expected.summary: Two high-severity financial compliance violations — remove guaranteed return language and add mandatory risk warning.

input.text: Zenith Corp today announced record Q3 revenues of $2.4 billion, driven by strong demand in the APAC region. The company expects continued growth in the coming quarters.

rules.description: Press releases must not make forward-looking statements without a safe-harbour disclaimer.
Financial figures cited must be accompanied by the relevant reporting period and accounting standard.

violations.excerpt: expects continued growth in the coming quarters
violations.explanation: Forward-looking statement without a safe-harbour disclaimer exposing the company to liability if results differ.
violations.suggested_rewording: Add: 'Forward-looking statements involve risks and uncertainties. Actual results may differ materially.'

expected.summary: One medium-severity violation — add a safe-harbour disclaimer for the forward-looking growth statement.

input.text: Hi Maria, just following up on your support ticket #4821 from last Tuesday. Our engineering team reviewed the logs and we have deployed a fix in version 3.6.2. Please upgrade and let us know if the issue persists.

rules.description: Customer communications must not include unsubstantiated promises of resolution.
Emails referencing ticket numbers must accurately state the ticket status.

expected.summary: Compliant — the email accurately references the ticket, states a concrete fix was deployed, and invites follow-up without overpromising.

input.text: SuperFast VPN is the world's most secure and fastest VPN, trusted by millions of privacy-conscious users. Sign up now and get 100% anonymous browsing forever.

rules.description: No unsubstantiated superlatives (world's best, most secure, fastest) without evidence.
No absolute privacy claims (100% anonymous, completely private) without technical substantiation.
Claims of user counts must be verifiable.

violations.excerpt: world's most secure and fastest VPN
violations.explanation: Superlatives 'most secure' and 'fastest' are unsupported by cited benchmarks or audits.
Absolute anonymity claims are technically unverifiable and may mislead users about their actual privacy exposure.
violations.suggested_rewording: strong privacy protection that minimizes your digital footprint

violations.excerpt: trusted by millions of privacy-conscious users
violations.explanation: User count claim 'millions' is unsubstantiated and must be verifiable or removed.

expected.summary: Three advertising compliance violations — remove or substantiate all superlatives, absolute privacy claims, and unverified user counts.
